description: The Invite Request Item component is used to handle the visual and behavior of invite requests received in chats from other users.

fields.ContactDialog: The dialog component that this is under.
fields.HeaderText: The text field that makes up the header for this request in the chat.
fields.InviteButton: The button to invite the user or forward the invite to the next in command.
fields.AddContactButton: The button to add the user who is asking for an invite as a contact.

methods.SendDirectInvite: Handles sending a direct invite to the asking user.
methods.ForwardInviteRequestToHost: Handles forwarding the invite request to the host.
methods.AddAsContact: Handles adding the asking user as a contact.
methods.AddHostAsContact: Handles adding the host who is receiving the invite as a contact.
methods.AddAsHeadlessContact: Handles adding the headless host who is receiving the invite as a contact.

usage: Not used directly by the user, but is used in the contacts screen.
